creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: fernape
Date: Tue Apr 16 16:12:02 UTC 2019
New revision: 499099
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/499099

Log:
  devel/interactive_rebase_tool: Update to version 1.0.0

  From ChangeLog
  (https://github.com/MitMaro/git-interactive-rebase-tool/releases/tag/1.0.0)

  Added

   * Support for unicode characters
   * Horizontal and vertical overflow support

  Changed

   * Show git now uses libgit2 instead of external command

  PR:	237304
  Submitted by:	petteri.valkonen@iki.fi (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/devel/interactive_rebase_tool/Makefile
  head/devel/interactive_rebase_tool/distinfo
